title: matricaria auriculata
intro: Matricaria auriculata, also known as sweet goldeneye, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Matricaria auriculata can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
